name: MSI PRO X670-P WIFI ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 2x PCIe 4.0 x16 - Support DDR5-6600+(OC) - 4x M.2 Slots - 2x USB 3.2 Gen2x2 Type-C - USB 3.2 Gen 2 10Gbps (Type-C Display port) - HDMI 2.1 - DP 1.4 - 2.5G LAN - 802.11ax Wi-Fi 6E (X670PROPWIFI)
shortName: MSI PRO X670-P WIFI ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 2x PCIe 4.0 x16
description: Mainstream AMD AM5 ATX motherboard with X670 chipset, DDR5 support, and Wi-Fi 6E for everyday builds.
